name: ronin-agent
description: RONIN — Semi-Autonomous Super Agent with MCP Tool Server
author: Dopamine Ronin

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../server && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test:tools: cd server && python -c "import ronin_mcp_server; print('✅ Server module OK')"
scripts.lint:server: cd server && python -m py_compile ronin_mcp_server.py && echo '✅ Syntax OK'
